basic_details.short_information: Tripura PSC Recruitment 2026 offers 08 vacancies for Junior Engineer posts. Eligible candidates with B.Tech, Diploma can apply online from 19-05-2026 to 12-06-2026 through the official Tripura PSC website, tpsc.tripura.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Electrical Engineering for Grade-I and Diploma in Electrical Engineering for Grade-II.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Tripura PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Tripura PSC Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
